name: Provision Information Co.,Ltd.
summary: Provision Information Co.,Ltd. provides payment, financial application, security, and outsourcing services to the financial industry. It offers payment solutions, such as ProIBRS, an interbank remittance system; ProATM, an ATM auto-transaction system; ProEPS FEDI, an enterprise payment system/financial EDI; ProEPS FXML, an enterprise payment system/financial XML; ProCMS, a card management system for IC cards and magnetic cards; ProIB/WebATM, an Internet banking/Web ATM; and real-time gross settlement mechanism. Its payment solutions also ProTGW-TSM, a mobile payment TSM gateway; ProTGW-HCE, a mobile payment HCE gateway; ProeACH, an eACH gateway for joined banks; and digital payment solutions consisting of ProePAY, a digital payment system, as well as payment gateways. The company also provides financial application solutions, including ProFEP, a platform for developing financial transactions; ProComm, an integrated communication server; ProFCS, a collection system for financial industry; ProMIPS, an encryption kit for file transmission; ProACS, an ATM controlled system; ProAMS, an ATM management system; and ProJCIC, a joint credit inquiry system. In addition, it offers information security products comprising ProHSM, a hardware security module (HSM); ProHSM KMC, a key management console; ProMonitor, a HSM monitoring system; ProHSM HRM, a HSM resource managers; ProHSM SUIP, a secure user interface program; and ProVA, a validation authority system. Further, the company provides outsourcing services, including on-site human resource services for various industries, platforms, and job roles. Provision Information Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
